name: Grove Collaborative Holdings, Inc.
description: Grove Collaborative Holdings, Inc. operates as a sustainable consumer products company. It provides natural and eco-friendly household cleaning, personal care, baby, beauty, and pet products directly to consumers. The company offers its products under its own brands, including Grove Co., Peach Not Plastic, and Rooted Beauty, as well as third-party brands. Grove Collaborative is committed to being plastic-free and carbon-neutral, helping consumers make sustainable choices for their homes and families.
